description.en: A neighborhood sea-deity temple; small in scale but an important window into the faith life of Tainan's early fishing communities. Such small temples have largely disappeared with Taiwan's urbanization, making its survival especially precious.
description.zh: 地方性海神廟，規模雖小卻是理解台南早期漁業社群信仰生活的重要窗口。此類小型廟宇在台灣都市化過程中大量消失，能保存至今尤為珍貴。
